data.title: Bitcoin mining dominance in North America declines, paving the way for competitors like China amid Trump's push for control.
data.description: The Bitcoin mining industry in North America is seeing a decline in dominance as it is losing ground to competitors such as China. This shift has resulted in North America producing a smaller proportion of newly minted BTC compared to before.
Reports in U.S.: : Judge declines to immediately grant state's request to block ICE's actions in Minnesota .

data.title: Greenberg Traurig in Miami adds Jay Yagoda & Melissa Groisman, enhancing appellate and real estate teams.
data.description: In Miami on January 14, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, P.A., a global law firm, enhanced its already strong appellate and real estate divisions with the arrival of two skilled attorneys. This move reinforces the firm's dominant presence in South Florida, consolidating its position in the region.

data.title: Mamawi Atosketan Native School wins 2026 Zayed Sustainability Prize in Global High Schools Americas category.
data.description: Mamawi Atosketan Native School, located in Abu Dhabi, UAE, has been awarded the prestigious 2026 Zayed Sustainability Prize in the Global High Schools competition under The Americas Category. This accolade recognizes the school's outstanding efforts towards sustainability and environmental conservation. The school's innovative initiatives have made a significant impact, with a focus on promoting sustainability practices within the education sector. The Zayed Sustainability Prize highlights the importance of sustainable development and honors institutions like Mamawi Atosketan Native School for their dedication.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to $502.1 million non-prime RMBS from NRMLT 2026-NQM1 sponsored by Rithm Capital Corp.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage-backed notes from New Residential Mortgage Loan Trust 2026-NQM1 (NRMLT 2026-NQM1), valued at $502.1 million. This transaction is a non-prime RMBS sponsored by Rithm Capital Corp. (formerly New Residential Investment Corp.), a publicly traded real estate investment trust (NYSE: RITM). The majority of the underlying mortgages (52.6%) were originated by NewRez LLC, with the rest (27.4%) coming from Caliber Home Loans Inc, LLC.

data.title: Riley Construction in Wisconsin and Illinois announces Ben Kossow as Chief Executive. Leadership transitions set.
data.description: Kenosha, Wisconsin - On January 14, 2026, Riley Construction, a prominent commercial construction management and general construction company operating in Wisconsin and Illinois, revealed the appointment of Ben Kossow as their Chief Executive. This move signifies a strategic shift for the company, showcasing their commitment to growth and development under Kossow's leadership. As a long-time leader within the organization, Kossow brings with him a wealth of experience and expertise, poised to drive Riley Construction forward in the competitive construction industry. This development is anticipated to have a significant impact on the company's operations and future trajectory, with stakeholders eager to witness the outcomes.

data.title: AGH hospital employees honored with HBO Max event for their heroic work, with a unique pop-up event in Pittsburgh.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 14, 2026, A special pop-up event was held at AHN Allegheny General Hospital (AGH) to honor and appreciate the employees for their heroic efforts and collaboration in "THE PITT." The event, known as the "Wellness & Celebration Experience," was organized on-site to recognize the hard work of the AGH employees. This unique event brought together a total of X employees from AGH, highlighting their dedication and partnership in serving the community. The employees were acknowledged for their exceptional contributions and commitment to their work during this event.

data.title: Rogers Sugar Inc. (RSI) to discuss Q1 2026 results on Feb 5th, 2026, 8am ET.
data.description: In Montreal on January 14, 2026, Rogers Sugar Inc. announced that they will conduct a conference call to review their first quarter financial outcomes for 2026. The call is scheduled to take place on Thursday, February 5th, 2026, starting at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This event serves as a platform for discussing the company's performance and is a significant opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into RSI's activities during this period.

data.title: Signing Day Sports closes $5.6M public offering, selling 9.48M shares of common stock at $0.5905 each with warrants.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Scottsdale, AZ, Signing Day Sports, Inc. completed its public offering of common stock. The company, listed on NYSE American as SGN, sold 9,483,500 shares of common stock alongside warrants for 14,225,250 shares at a price of $0.5905 per share and accompanying warrant. Signing Day Sports developed an app and platform to assist high school athletes in the recruitment process.

data.title: BMI Imaging unveils Bytreon™, a verified system for lasting records trustworthiness. Released by the Calif. firm on Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: Introducing Bytreon™ by BMI Imaging Systems, Inc. from Sunnyvale, California on January 14, 2026. Bytreon™ ensures records last through time by providing proof instead of assumed trust. This innovative system revolutionizes secure digitization and digital preservation, setting new standards in the industry.

data.title: Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council expands to include Iowa and Nebraska, becoming one of the largest councils in the country.
data.description: In a recent development on January 14, 2026, the Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council expanded its jurisdiction to now cover Iowa and Nebraska. This restructuring has solidified the Regional Council as one of the largest carpenters' councils in the nation, spanning across five states. This expansion marks a significant increase in influence and presence for the Council, underscoring its prominent position within the industry.

data.title: SPARX Hockey's Sparx BEAM™ wins 2025 GOOD DESIGN® Award for design excellence in Acton, Massachusetts.
data.description: A cutting-edge laser measurement system, the Sparx BEAM™, developed by Sparx Hockey, a top provider of automated skate sharpening technology based in ACTON, Mass., has recently garnered international acclaim for its exceptional design. The prestigious recognition came in the form of a 2025 GOOD DESIGN® Award, highlighting the innovation and excellence of the product. This achievement underscores the company's dedication to advancement in the industry.

data.title: KBRA assigns AA rating to Los Angeles Department of Water and Power System Revenue Bonds, 2025 Series D, with Stable Outlook.
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned a long-term rating of AA to the 2025 Series D Department of Water and Power of the City of Los Angeles Power System Revenue Bonds. At the same time, KBRA has confirmed the AA rating on existing parity Power System Revenue Bonds. The Outlook for these bonds is Stable. This rating reflects positive aspects such as a diverse generation mix that ensures ample net dependable capacity compared to peak demand, reducing potential risks.

data.title: Hawk introduces Analytics Studio for financial institutions to optimize AI model lifecycle. 91% of banks support AI use.
data.description: In Munich today, Hawk, a prominent provider of AI-driven solutions for anti-money laundering, screening, and fraud prevention, unveiled Analytics Studio, its latest innovation in AI lifecycle management. This tool empowers banks and payment firms with enhanced oversight over the development, upkeep, and regulation of their AI models. As 91% of banks are actively promoting the adoption of AI, the process of constructing and managing these models has become a critical focus for teams responsible for combating financial crime and ensuring compliance.
